Slab Selection · In-House Fabrication
From Slab to Sanctuary

Every kitchen deserves a foundation that lasts.

CORNERSTONELV is a Las Vegas-based countertop fabrication and installation company built on precision, honesty, and craftsmanship. We hand-select every slab, cut to exact measurements, and install with a level of care that shows in every seam and edge.

No subcontracted labor, no rushed installs — just a local team that treats your kitchen like the centerpiece of your home.

100%In-House Install
FreeEstimates
LVLocally Owned
Materials

Stone for every kitchen, every budget.

We source natural and engineered stone from trusted slab yards, so you get the exact color, vein pattern, and finish you want — nothing generic.

Granite

Natural durability and one-of-a-kind veining. Heat and scratch resistant — a timeless choice.

Quartz

Engineered for consistency and low maintenance. Caesarstone, Silestone & Cambria available.

Marble

Soft, luminous veining for a true luxury look. A statement surface for islands and bathrooms alike.

Quartzite

The look of marble with the toughness of granite — a favorite for Las Vegas homes.

How It Works

Three steps from slab to countertop.

01 / Consult

Free In-Home Estimate

We measure your space, walk through material options, and give you a straightforward quote — no pressure, no hidden fees.

02 / Fabricate

Precision Cutting & Polishing

Your slab is cut, edged, and polished in-house to exact template measurements for a flawless fit.

03 / Install

Clean, Careful Installation

Our team installs on schedule and leaves your kitchen spotless — ready to enjoy the same day.
